Variables.Name: Name_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Name of bone, this is the search criteria to match with mesh bone. This will be NAME_None if deleted.

Variables.Name: ParentIndex_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Parent Index. -1 if not used. The root has 0 as its parent. Do not delete the element but set this to -1. If it is revived by other reason, fix up this link.
